evals.prompt: Bootstrap Tack into this existing TypeScript monorepo: governance docs, project/ template, TACK.md, optional .cursorrules stub for Cursor, and specialist routing. Do not implement product features.
evals.expected_output: Starts six-phase bootstrap interview; never writes application feature code.
expectations: Response describes a phased bootstrap (detection, discovery, routing, copy to project/, governance) rather than jumping straight to coding features
Response states or implies that application/product code is out of scope for this skill
Response references template under the skill directory or project/ layout rather than inventing an unrelated framework
Response does not implement a login, API route, or UI screen as the main deliverable for this request

evals.prompt: Implement JWT login with refresh tokens in our NestJS app. Ship production code and tests.
evals.expected_output: Does not treat this as bootstrap-only work; refuses or redirects to implementation / tack-run / normal dev—not six-phase Tack install.
expectations: Response does not begin Phase 1 detection summary as if the only task were Tack installation
Response clarifies that feature implementation is outside tack-bootstrap or redirects to appropriate workflow
Response does not offer to copy project/template as the sole action without addressing the implementation ask
Response does not emit full NestJS module code as the primary completion of the bootstrap skill

evals.prompt: Phase 2 business-rule discovery for our EXISTING repo is done from my side—looks good, ok, ship it. Move on.
evals.expected_output: Does not advance phase on synonyms; runs more clarifying questions and re-prompts for literal `complete` per rule 9.
expectations: Response does not accept ok, ship it, looks good, done, finished, go, or next as the Phase 2 done gate
Response asks at least one clarifying follow-up aligned with least-covered Phase 2 sections OR explicitly states the literal complete requirement
Response re-prompts for the exact token complete (or quotes the rule requiring that string)
Response does not jump to Phase 3 or Phase 5 immediately after only colloquial approval words
